mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, name, url, file_type, file_size, download_count, sort FROM osh_course_material WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE osh_course_material
name = #{materialName}, url = #{fileUrl}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, sort = #{sort}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_course_material SET delete_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE osh_course_material SET delete_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
UPDATE osh_course_material SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, url FROM osh_course_material WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
